title: Pre-Algebra & Algebra 1
author: Jason Wang
description: Clear notes on every key concept — definitions, rules, and worked examples. The primary reference for this course.

title: Probability & Statistics
author: DeGroot & Schervish
description: The rigorous academic treatment of probability and statistics. Covers distributions, estimation, hypothesis testing, and Bayesian methods.

title: Python for Data Analysis
author: Wes McKinney
description: The definitive guide to pandas, NumPy, and data wrangling in Python. Essential for working with real datasets.

title: Machine Learning for Time Series
author: Krasser et al.
description: Practical machine learning techniques applied to time series data in Python.

title: Time Series Analysis
author: Shumway & Stoffer
description: The classic statistical treatment of time series — ARIMA, spectral analysis, state space models.

title: Algorithmic Trading: Winning Strategies
author: Ernie Chan
description: Practical strategies for algorithmic trading — mean reversion, momentum, risk management, backtesting.

title: Quantitative Trading
author: Ernie Chan
description: How to build your own algorithmic trading business — from strategy research to live execution.
